allow: Bash(docker compose build api celery_worker celery_beat)

Bash(docker run --rm infra-api:latest bash -c "echo PATH=$PATH && which uvicorn && which celery")

Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT pid, state, query, now\(\) - query_start AS duration FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state != ''idle'' ORDER BY duration DESC;")
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT pid, state, left\(query,60\) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = ''active'';")
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "\\dt")
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = ''public'';")
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE application_name != ''psql'';")
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM pg_stat_activity;")
Bash(docker exec infra-api-1 alembic upgrade head)
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT typname FROM pg_type WHERE typcategory = ''E'';")
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT typname FROM pg_type WHERE typcategory = ''E''; SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = ''public'';")

Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT pid, state, wait_event_type, wait_event, left\(query, 80\) as q FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = ''active'' OR wait_event IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pid;")
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT pid, state, left\(query, 80\) as q FROM pg_stat_activity;")
Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT pid, state, xact_start, left\(query, 100\) as q FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state != ''idle'' OR xact_start IS NOT NULL;")

Bash(docker exec infra-db-1 psql -U financeops -d financeops -c "SELECT pid, state, xact_start, left\(query, 100\) as q FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state IS NOT NULL AND state = ''idle in transaction'';")
